# models/

This directory contains trained model files. These are not committed
to the repository because they are user-specific and large.

## Files generated by calibration

| File | Generated by | Description |
|---|---|---|
| classifier_personal.pt | train_personal_model.py | Personal CNN+BiLSTM weights |
| scaler_personal.joblib | train_personal_model.py | Personal EMG scaler |
| centroids.npz | calibration.py | Optional centroid vectors |

## Pre-trained files (if included)

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| classifier_final.pt | Cross-user pre-trained weights (baseline) |
| scaler_full.joblib | Scaler for pre-trained model |
| label_map.json | Letter → integer mapping (a=0 … z=25) |
| training_stats.json | EMG channel statistics from training data |

Run calibration to generate your personal model files:

```bash
python scripts/collect_calibration_data.py
python scripts/train_personal_model.py
```
